text.title: Procurement Management Framework Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked examples illustrating rule application and artefact shape.

example.title: Fixed-price SOW for mobile app build
example.note: Scope: design + build + App Store approval. Deliverables D1-D5 with AC per row. Timeline 12 weeks, 25/50/25 payment split. Sensitivity: 3 vendors scored; rank stable under ±10% weight shifts. Contract clause checklist passed at signing.
